programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - Bat Masterson & the Dodge City Dead Line: Part 2: Legendary gunfighter-turned-newspaperman Bat Masterson looks back on his time as sheriff of Dodge City when he and Wyatt Earp worked together to bring law and order to the notorious frontier town. As they struggle to pacify the rowdy cowhands passing through town, the two men draw their own proverbial “line in the sand.” South of the railroad track that splits the town, they let the cowboys run wild. But on the north side, they outlaw all guns in an effort to create a zone of civility. When a troublemaker crosses this “dead line” with his gun, it sets off a chain reaction of violence that ends the life of the town's beloved entertainer, the celebrated singer Dora Hand. After tracking down her killer, Masterson shoots him in the arm as he tries to escape. When the judge learns there are no witnesses, however, he sets the killer free due to lack of evidence, leaving Masterson with a moral dilemma. Does he seek revenge or await the slow wheel of justice?

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Into The Wild Frontier - Joe Walker: Humble Hero: Joe Walker doesn't head west to seek fame and fortune, but his trailblazing explorations across the uncharted frontier usher in a golden age of expansion and settlement that help create the United States as we know them today.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Into The Wild Frontier - Jim Clyman: Frontier Survivor: When he is separated from his trapping party, frontiersman Jim Clyman is 600 miles from the nearest fort. To survive the grueling trek, he must put his fate in the hands of Native Americans, without knowing if they will help him or kill him on sight.

programme.title: The Young Riders
programme.desc: The Young Riders - Ten-Cent Hero: A dime novelist takes revenge on Jimmy by creating a story in his latest novel, penning him as Wild Bill Hickok, "the fastest gun in the West." Soon afterward, a hired gunman arrives in Sweetwater to take him down in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Rifleman - The Prodigal: A bank robber hides at the McCain Ranch and takes Lucas and Mark hostage. Problems arise when the gunman's mother shows up, believing he owns the ranch and Mark is her grandson. The truth comes out when more gunmen arrive.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: FinQuest
programme.desc: In Episode 3 of FinQuest, Ryan Miller joins Captain Alex from Supremacy Fishing Charters for an offshore adventure targeting big fish off shore. Starting at the Palm Beach Inlet, the team uses planar fishing techniques to hook wahoo and other catches like kingfish and amberjack. Along the way, firefighter Johnny Bennett shares his journey from fishing to starting a popular fish dip business. The day wraps up with thrilling doubleheader catches and a conservation message, showcasing the importance of sustainable fishing practices.

programme.title: FinQuest
programme.desc: In Episode 4 of FinQuest, Ryan Miller explores Jupiter's Inner Coastal Waterway, blending fishing, paddleboarding, and community engagement. With the help of Matthew from Jupiter Live Bait, Ryan showcases bait preparation techniques before catching snook in the vibrant ICW. He highlights Jupiter's community spirit by joining a local clean-up initiative with Jeremy from Blue Line Paddleboards. The episode features paddleboarding adventures with Ryan's family, connecting with nature and marine life, and ends with a conservation message about preserving Jupiter's pristine environment.

programme.title: The Cast
programme.desc: Rex meets up with “Mr Crappie” Wally Marshall in Texas. Wally takes Rex to one of his secret spots to put the hammer on the crappie. Not only did they catch crappie, but nice largemouth and some top tier coppernose bluegill.

programme.title: Stomping Grounds
programme.sub-title: Stomping Grounds - "Alaska's Massive Marvels: A Boating Expedition through America's Last Frontier Pt 2
programme.desc: From battling towering 12-foot waves in the Gulf of Alaska, to reeling in colossal 200 lb. halibut, they discover firsthand the rugged beauty of America's 49th state. This episode highlights Lindell Yachts as a top builder of rugged offshore sportfishing yachts, as well as Radon Boats as great pilothouse fishing and guide boats.

programme.title: Primos
programme.desc: Team Primos chases whitetail deer at our home camp, Kudzu Bluff, on the edge of the MS Delta.

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting
programme.sub-title: Deer and Deer Hunting - "The Other Red Meat
programme.desc: It's lean, delicious, savory and the best part of the hunt. In this episode of Deer and Deer Hunting, Dan Schmidt, Mark Kayser and Brad Fenson share with us their thoughts on the other red meat, venison.

programme.title: Primal Divide
programme.desc: In this episode, John competes in another Tactical Games event in Pennsylvania and a Total Archery Challenge. If you're not familiar with these…. The Tactical Games is a cross fit meets 2 Gun style competition. The TAC events are a big Archery 3D fun shoot with targets ranging from 15 to 120 yds! If you've never done one of these, DO IT!!!

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "Hunting Mouflon and Hybrid Kri Kri Ibex- Dugi Otok Island In Croatia
programme.desc: Mark Peterson is in for an adrenaline-packed adventure in Croatia as he targets the elusive Kri Kri Ibex and Mouflon. With expert guides and unwavering determination, Mark navigates rugged terrain and thrilling hunts, showcasing the excitement and skill of the hunting industry. As his time in Croatia winds down, the episode captures the essence of ethical practices and the intense pursuit that defines this exhilarating sport. Don't miss the epic conclusion to Mark's expedition, where passion, skill, and the thrill of the hunt converge in unforgettable moments.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: The Journey Within - "Cinnamon Teal Everywhere- First Hunt In Peru | The Journey Within, South American Waterfowl Slam
programme.desc: Mark's quest for the South America Waterfowl Slam has now taken him to Peru where he finds a surprising density of Cinnamon Teal. Although he already checked this species off the list in Argentina, his first hunt in Peru proves to be one of the best Cinnamon Teal shoots of his life. This is only the first afternoon and there are 5 days left to hunt the remaining 7 species.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Follow TTHA President/CEO Christina Pittman and her husband Matt this week as they tag along side Dr. James Kroll for his annual deer day! This is a great opportunity to learn from one of the best. We are blessed to be able to share his knowledge with other like minded outdoor enthusiasts.

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: Josh Kinser from Big and J introduced his daughters to hunting throughout South TX. With trips earlier in the year cancelled, Josh and Hattie were invited to join the TTHA crew at G2 ranch. The first night of the hunt proved to be a success for Hattie, wrapping a TX tag around her biggest buck. Josh and Hattie will have memories to last a lifetime after this hunt!

programme.title: Storytellers
programme.desc: The bond between and parent and child can grow in many ways, but nothing compares to the bond shared when hunting. The annual Father-Son hunt at FE Hill Outfitters has becoming a tradition for Heath and his son Gavin and in 2021, Gavin was able to take his largest buck to date, with his dad Heath behind the camera.

programme.title: Laugh & Learn
programme.desc: Laugh & Learn is a charming educational show designed for preschoolers, where entertainment meets learning. Featuring adorable characters, the show introduces children to fundamental concepts such as numbers, letters, shapes, and colors through interactive play, memorable songs, and engaging storylines. Each episode encourages curiosity and cognitive development while ensuring children have a joyful and laughter-filled experience. With its vibrant animation and child-friendly approach, Laugh & Learn by Mattel is a trusted companion for parents and a beloved favorite among young viewers

programme.title: Kipper
programme.desc: "Kipper" is an enchanting animated children's series that centers around the whimsical escapades of a lovable dog named Kipper. Alongside his friends, including Tiger the dog, Pig, and Arnold the piglet, Kipper embarks on a variety of adventures that emphasize friendship, curiosity, and the joy of discovery. The show is known for its gentle humor, engaging storytelling, and colorful animation that appeal to preschool-aged children. With each episode, young viewers are invited into Kipper's world where everyday experiences turn into magical explorations, fostering a love for learning and imagination.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Caillou Makes a Meal // Caillou's New Groove // Caillou Goes Bowling
programme.desc: Caillou learns that home-made pizza is better than the fast-food pizza they have delivered to their door. // Caillou sees how important it is to adapt to change when Grandpa and Grandma babysit overnight. // Caillou learns to keep an open mind when he tries the game of bowling.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Big Kid Caillou // Caillou's Glasses // Caillou's Dance Party
programme.desc: When Caillou's older friend Andre comes over for a play date, Caillou learns a lesson about the importance of not hiding who you really are. // Caillou realizes how important good vision is after making a pretend pair of glasses // Caillou learns there's more than one way to do things when Miss Martin throws a dance party at preschool.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Caillou's Shadow // High Flyers // Caillou's Leaf Pile
programme.desc: Caillou is no longer afraid to ask questions after becoming a "shadow scientist" and learning about shadows at preschool. // Caillou learns to speak up and express his opinion during a play date with Daniel. // Caillou decides to be resourceful and create his own 'jumping pile' after having some fun in the fall leaves.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Sharing the Rocketship // Coach Grandpa // The Safety Helper
programme.desc: Caillou and Leo come to realize the true meaning of 'sharing' when they purchase a toy rocketship together. // When Grandpa takes on the job of soccer coach, Caillou comes to realize his grandpa is proud of him - no matter what! // Caillou learns he doesn't need a badge in order to help others when he takes on the role of preschool "safety helper".

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Rushing the Raspberry // Wait to Skate // Caillou's Hiccups
programme.desc: Caillou realizes good things are worth waiting for when he decides to help Mommy grow a raspberry bush. // When Daddy builds an ice rink in the backyard, Caillou comes to realize the importance of being patient. // Caillou learns not to make a mountain out of a molehill when he gets a bad case of the hiccups!

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: Caillou's Cross-Hop // Glitter Glitch // The Untidy Classroom
programme.desc: Caillou learns about the importance of following safety rules after discovering some frogs that need help crossing the street. // Caillou learns the importance of handwashing after he forgets to wash his hands and leaves a trail of glitter around the preschool. // Caillou learns the importance of cleaning up after yourself after Miss Martin suggests a messy experiment in the classroom.

programme.title: Caillou
programme.sub-title: No Tradebacks! // Shoe Story // Rollie Racers

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Between 12 and 24 months, little ones become increasingly interested in more complex ideas and begin to explore numbers and counting. Numbers Nursery introduces little ones to numerals 1 through 5 in a captivating, interactive way that invites them to join in, clap their hands and count out loud.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies grow and change, so does the landscape around them. From fiery red leaves to falling snowflakes from flowers in bloom to fireworks in July, every season of the year has its own special magic just waiting to be discovered.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Share a rainbow of sights and sounds with your baby as you discover the wonders of color together! Join puppet host "Vincent Van Goat" as he creates six Van Gogh masterpieces exploring red, green, blue, yellow, orange, and purple. World Of Colors is a spirited celebration of creative expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Dive in with your little explorer across the seas to meet amazing animals living in the ocean, coral reef, and polar regions. Overflowing with underwater footage of whales, dolphins, tropical fish, and more, Neptune's Oceans invites you and your baby on an oceanic voyage of discovery!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Within a baby's first year of life, new experiences can transform what might otherwise seem to be ordinary events into exciting opportunities for imaginative play. Baby Neptune exposes little ones to the wonders of water in their world -- whether they're stomping in the rain, splashing in the bathtub, playing "catch me if you can" with the tide on the beach, or "meeting" the fascinating creatures that live in rivers, lakes and oceans.

PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: Slugterra

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When the Shane Gang arrive at a cavern overrun by thieves terrorizing the good townfolk, they decide to use Pronto as bait, hoping the thieves will eliminate each other as each strives to be the first to capture the valuable molenoid-the only one the Eastern Caverns have ever seen. However, their plan goes awry when Underlord Holt arrives and commands the thieves to work together to bring him Pronto-dead or alive!

programme.title: Slugterra

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet
programme.desc: Philippe Cousteau Jr. is no stranger to exploration. The grandson of legendary underwater explorer Jacques Cousteau, Philippe hosts and serves as executive producer of this half-hour earth science series that examines the planet. He visits diamond and gold mines to see how gems and metals are formed, travels to active volcanoes to observe what happens inside the Earth's burning core, and checks out weather stations in mountainous areas to get an idea of how weather phenomena form in the atmosphere.

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci
programme.desc: The "don't try this at home" warning seen on some TV shows doesn't apply to this series, which encourages the discovery of scientific concepts through experiments that viewers can reproduce in their own homes. Science teacher Steve Spangler hosts the show, providing step-by-step demonstrations of the DIY experiments that help explain scientific principles. Among the experiments presented is one that gained Spangler fame, in which he showed what happens when a mint candy is dropped into a bottle of diet soda. On the show, he explains the "why" and "how" behind the experiment and what cause the soda to react with the candy.

programme.title: Armando Anto: The Maestro of Comedy
programme.desc: Armando has been perfecting his unique style of comedy, utilizing his decades of classical violin mastery, his guitar skills, and even breakdance in his act.

programme.title: Jason Hewlett: I'm the Weird One
programme.desc: The Award-Winning One-Man Show of Jason Hewlett The Entertainer will have you laughing until it hurts. Comedy, Music, Impressions, and Standing Ovations make Jason the perfect entertainer.

programme.title: Kevin Bozeman
programme.desc: In 1999, Kevin found himself in the real world with no real job skills and a strong desire to work an hour a day. What to do? Inspired by nights on the couch watching TV comedians, Kevin decided to head over to nearby Madison, WI and try the “Open-Mic Night”. Thirteen years later Kevin is still going on-stage, and he has found the job that fit his requirements. “For an hour a night I'm wildly successful”. With a smooth and clever style, a great smile and a contagious laugh Kevin has been entertaining in clubs and colleges across the country. In 2000 he was the winner of the Midwest region of the HBO “Comedy Competition” and flew to Los Angeles to compete as a finalist. He performed on Comedy Central's “Premium Blend” in 2003, and finished 2nd in the Boston Comedy Competition in 2005. He was a semi-finalist on NBC's “Last Comic Standing” in 2010. This past summer he co-starred in the Indie film “Flat Chested” starring Alicia Witt and Luke Perry. He currently resides in Chicago.

programme.title: Jay Stevens
programme.desc: Jay Stevens has been a professional comedian for almost 20 years. Growing up, he was known as a hilarious outgoing character by friends, family, colleagues and those he would meet on a first encounter.

programme.title: Kellen Erskine
programme.desc: Kellen Erskine was featured on season 7 of NBC's America's Got Talent. His jokes have appeared in many publications including the Reader's Digest. Kellen has been a finalist of both the San Francisco International Comedy Competition and the Great American Comedy Festival. This year he performed at the prestigious Bridgetown Comedy Festival in Portland, Oregon. Kellen opens regularly for Frank Caliendo of FOX's NFL Sunday.

programme.title: Caleb Elliott: Diary of a Smooth Black Kid
programme.desc: One of DryBar's youngest comics, Caleb Elliot proves that age is anything but a setback.

programme.title: Bill Campbell: Getting Up There
programme.desc: Bill Campbell is not as young as he used to be. Egos are lost in translation, contact lenses are replaced by magic markers, and garage sales are negotiated cent-by-cent.

programme.title: David Crowe
programme.desc: David Crowe is a 20 year veteran of the comedy stage. After winning both the Seattle and San Francisco Comedy Competitions, then performing for a US President the same year, his career took off and has never stopped. On stage Crowe is armed with a "gallery of facial expressions", a host of accents and a "nerdy charisma that is utterly captivating." He has been featured on Showtime with his own One Hour Comedy Special "Crooked Finger," along with numerous appearances on Comedy Central, Bob&Tom Radio, SiriusXM and Pandora. Overseas, he crushed the competition at the Edinburgh International Fringe Festival garnering three perfect 5-Star reviews from their rather sticky and jaded press (you can read them here in the Testimonials section). David is a guaranteed hit on the corporate entertainment circuit. He has performed at literally hundreds of corporate and private events across the United States and Canada. (See "Past Client" list under Testimonials). He recently concluded a nationwide comedy tour for Investors Group, a financial services company, where he performed for over 60,000 of their most valued clients in 60 different cities. To date, David has released five comedy albums. He believes the best way to stay sharp and relevant is to continue to hone and perfect new material at comedy clubs across the country with the goal of releasing an new comedy special every few years.

programme.title: Sam Adams
programme.desc: Smooth. Clever. Hilarious. These words are often used to describe Sam Adams as a comedian, public speaker and Master of Ceremonies. In 2001, he stepped on stage to perform stand-up comedy for the first time, at age 41. Eight years later Sam turned to a career in comedy full-time after winning at the Great American Comedy Festival. Sam changed careers after making a name for himself as one of Denver's premier sports journalists. In 2003 was voted by his peers as Colorado's “Print Journalist of the Year.” As a reporter and columnist his work has been featured in The Denver Post, The Charlotte Observer, Rocky Mountain News and Colorado Avid Golfer magazine. Sam has also made numerous TV appearances on ESPN, Fox Sports, CBS, NBC and NFL Network. In 2013, he wrote a book, 'If You Don't Believe Me: Lessons Learned From Listening To The Greats,” giving readers an inside look at his 23-year career as a sports journalist.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Are you afraid of The Dark? You should be. Not because it's scary, it most certainly isn't, but because it will rattle your brains if you try too hard to understand what it's about. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.desc: Gaby's family secretly invite Alex to join them for Christmas.

programme.title: Mini Movie: The Christmas Trap
programme.desc: But surprisingly, the Christmas music brings back memories.

programme.title: Reba McEntire's Christmas in Tune
programme.desc: Singers Georgia and Joe agree to reunite in a Christmas Charity concert.

programme.title: Mistletoe in Montana
programme.desc: A single father books the the Paradise Ranch for Christmas week.

programme.title: Love & Mercy
programme.desc: The story of Beach Boys singer/song writer Brian Wilson and his struggles with mental illness.

programme.title: Freeheld
programme.desc: The real-life story of a detective and her domestic partner who battled the legal system for equal rights.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: A 5-year-old Indian is adopted by a couple in Australia 25 years later, he sets out to find his lost family.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The Turtles are back to battle a bigger threat alongside April O'Neil and vigilante Casey Jones. As they prepare to take on supervillain Shredder and his henchmen, Bebop and Rocksteady, they find themselves facing an even greater evil: the sinister Krang.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark
programme.desc: Get ready for thrills in Indiana Jones and the Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy and his ex-flame Marion Ravenwood dodge booby-traps, fight Nazis, and stare down snakes in their incredible worldwide quest for the mystical Ark of the Covenant.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom brings you thrills and excitement. Indy, his sidekick Short Round and nightclub singer Willie Scott go from high-flying action above the Himalayas to a spine-tingling escape from a fortress-like mine in India.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
programme.desc: There's nothing more exciting than trying to keep up with the Joneses in Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade. Indy's Nazi enemies are back and have kidnapped his father, in their effort to locate the sacred Holy Grail.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: A man goes on the run after he discovers that he is actually a "harvested being."

programme.title: Star Trek Beyond
programme.desc: The USS Enterprise is attacked by Krall, a warlord sworn against the Federation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt returns and partners up with the beautiful Nyah Hall to stop renegade agent Sean Ambrose.

programme.title: Blonde Ambition
programme.desc: A young woman's unconventional, comedic journey up the corporate ladder while finding love along the way.

programme.title: Gloria
programme.desc: A tough female ex-con and her recalcitrant 6-year-old charge go on the run from the mob.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol Agent and a Manhattan ADA try to bring to justice a powerful bank which is financing terrorism.

programme.title: Lakeview Terrace
programme.desc: A young couple move into their dream home and are harassed by their next-door neighbor, an LAPD officer.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: A decorated war veteran becomes entagled in the search for a fellow Medal of Honor winner's killer.

programme.title: You Can't Run Away From It
programme.desc: A spoiled heiress teams up with a reporter to escape her father's plan to keep her from marrying.

programme.title: Affair In Trinidad
programme.desc: A death finds a nightclub singer and her suspicious brother-in-law caught up in a web of espionage.

programme.title: Hook, Line And Sinker
programme.desc: Thinking he's dying, a poor schnook goes on a spending spree only to find out he's as healthy as a horse.

programme.title: Clue
programme.desc: Meet all the notorious suspects and discover all their foul play things. You'll love their dastardly doings as the bodies and the laughs pile up before your eyes. Featuring all three surprise endings!!

programme.title: Days of Thunder
programme.desc: Discovered by businessman Tim Daland, Cole is teamed with legendary crew chief and car-builder Harry Hogge to race for the Winston Cup at the Daytona 500. A crash nearly ends Cole's career, and he must turn to a beautiful doctor to regain his nerve.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, a secret agent, is framed for the deaths of his espionage team and attempts to flee government assassins after him. He races against the clock in order to discover the truth.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: The Little Rascals Save the Day
programme.desc: Spanky (Jet Jurgensmeyer), Alfalfa (Drew Justice) and the rest of the gang try to raise enough cash to save a bakery.

programme.title: A Christmas Number One
programme.desc: Two worlds collide when a music manager of a boy band and the guitarist in a death metal group connect over a Christmas hit they both desperately need.

programme.title: The Pirates of Penzance
programme.desc: Frederic (Rex Smith), who has spent his formative years as a junior pirate, plans to mark his 21st birthday by breaking free from the Pirate King (Kevin Kline) and beginning his courtship of Mabel (Linda Ronstadt). But because he was born on Feb. 29, a date that only arrives every fourth year, Frederic isn't technically 21 -- and the Pirate King is still his master. Unless something gives, Frederic will soon be on a collision course with the Pirate King's new nemesis: Mabel's father.

programme.title: Wish for Christmas
programme.desc: A high school senior, disappointed at having to miss the town's winter dance for a church service, wishes her family's faith away, with unexpected consequences.

programme.title: I'll Be Homeless For Christmas
programme.desc: When a petty thief learns that his latest mark is a struggling single mother who works at a homeless shelter, he decides to use his savvy street smarts to make this Christmas one to remember for her and her young son.

programme.title: The Christmas Dance
programme.desc: After having a traumatizing holiday history, Sarah learns to love Christmas again.

programme.title: Christmas Break-In
programme.desc: Christmas Break-In is the story of Izzy, a spunky nine year-old who gets left at school on the last day before Christmas break.

programme.title: The Christmas Kid
programme.desc: A take on Home Alone British style where the main character is all grown up now.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: Crystal comes from a wealthy family and loves spending her parent's money. When they decide it's time for her to make something of her life they give her until Christmas to clean up her act.

programme.title: Be Mine
programme.desc: A woman finds romance as she prepares to take over her mother's garden store.

programme.title: Accidentally In Love
programme.desc: Edie discovers love in London days before leaving for the US. Fate reunites them six years later.

programme.title: Miracle On Christmas
programme.desc: The holiday spirit seems distant for the Boyce family until an unexpected visitor and miracle change everything on Christmas Day.

programme.title: The Fabric of Christmas
programme.desc: Liam, a fireman, and Amy, a quilting teacher, team up to make a Christmas quilt for Liam's sister.

programme.title: My Little Bride
programme.desc: Bo-eun must marry Sang-min due to a family promise. Things get complicated when he becomes her school teacher.

programme.title: The Queen of Crime
programme.desc: As a meddling mom begins investigating her son's $1,000 water bill, she instinctively detects a crime behind it.

programme.title: Hope
programme.desc: Hope is sexually abused by a male stranger and experiences trauma. But with family support, she slowly heals.

programme.title: Untold Scandal
programme.desc: The objects of each other's first love in secret, Lady Cho and Jo-won become co-conspirators in a dangerous game of love and intrigue.

programme.title: Rogue Cell 2: Shadow Warrior
programme.desc: An Uber driver accidentally steps into a world of international assassins when he picks up the wrong passenger.

programme.title: The Perfect Wife
programme.desc: A young freelance photographer in Houston meets a beautiful determined teacher from Atlanta. His best friend tries to warn him about her. There is something a little strange about Claudia. Q loves her dearly but she may not be The Perfect Wife.

programme.title: Rain for Christmas TV-14
programme.desc: Malik decides to bring his girlfriend home to Houston for Christmas. When she meets his family, they think he is all wrong for her. He meets his grandpa's nurse, Rain, and soon realizes the true meaning of love and what he really wants for Christmas.

programme.title: And They Named Her Love
programme.desc: Love, a hopeless romantic painter, sets out on a cross country journey to find herself in the competitive world of artistry. When a near death experience brings Atlanta based songstress Nasada into her life, she goes on a journey to find out that love and business do not always mix.

programme.title: Manu Dibango, Daniel Rallo, Jerry Malekani & Frederic Gaillardet
programme.sub-title: Soul Makossa: Manu Dibango in Stuttgart
programme.desc: Manu Dibango, one of Africa's biggest musical stars and top saxophonists, is an indispensable artist. He was one of the first African musicians to score a worldwide hit with his 1972 release “Soul Makossa”, paving the way for many other artists. The very concept of world music owes much to him. A superb stage performer with great communicative humour, Dibango is above all one of the founding fathers of a modern African musical style that is open to jazz, R&B, salsa, gospel, funk, and reggae. This concert showcases all these genres, and features an excellent line-up of musicians from the four corners of the planet.

programme.title: Salif Keita, Souleymane Dournbia, Lansine Kouyate & N'Doumbé
programme.desc: Salif Keita's music is a rich combination of traditional Malian music with European and American influences. We can hear this in the instrumentation of Keita's music, which varies from traditional West-African instruments to Western European ones. The Malian singer was cast out by his family because of his albinism. In 1967 he moved to Bamako, where he started his musical career and joined Les Ambassadeurs (Internationaux). He achieved international acknowledgement with this band in the 1970s. After spending a couple of years in Ivory Coast, Salif has found his home base in Paris since 1984. During this 2010 concert, he proves to be rightfully referred to as “The Golden Voice of Africa”.

programme.title: Charlie Galbraith
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Stochelo Rosenberg & Peter Beets
programme.desc: The treasured compositions of guitarist Django Reinhardt, the founding father of hot club jazz, are engraved in everyone's memory. Although Reinhardt missed two fingers of his left hand, his virtuoso technique was unrivalled. Dutch guitarist Stochelo Rosenberg and pianist Peter Beets now have the pleasure to bring Django's music back to life with their infectious improvisations.

programme.title: Wes Montgomery
programme.sub-title: Herbie Man & Sonny Sharrock - Memphis underground
programme.desc: This selection of unforgettable performances by some of the most iconic and influential jazz guitarists in history showcases these legends' unique essence. Revel in Wes Montgomery's virtuosity as he performs the captivating “Nica's Dream” in Holland in 1965, and delight in the expressive beauty of his rendition of “Here's That Rainy Day”, recorded in London in that same year. Experience the timeless appeal of Joe Pass's “You Stepped Out of a Dream” and “You Turned The Tables on Me”, recorded live in Hanover in 1975. The interplay between Jim Hall and Atilla Zoller borders on the impossible as they perform “Extensions” in Hanover in 1973. Enjoy Jim Hall's lyrical solo performance of “I'm Getting Sentimental Over You” from 1964. Witness Sonny Sharrock's avant-garde fusion of jazz and rock in an exhilarating performance of “Peanut", recorded live in France in 1970. Sharrock is joined by flutist Herbie Mann in a soulful performance of “Memphis Underground” from 1969. Immerse yourself in the magic of jazz guitar!

programme.title: Bootsy Collins
programme.sub-title: Casper the Funky Ghost: Bootsy Collins à Vienne
programme.desc: Bootsy Collins, famed for playing with George Clinton and his very own Rubber Band, is used to playing syncopated, hard and relentlessly rhythmic music. With this unique style Bootsy was a major influence on the development of funk. Now in his 60s, the bassist seems animated by a new energy that reflects his new work on the album ‘Tha Funk Capitol of the World'. With this album, Bootsy Collins pays tribute to the artists with whom he worked during his frantic career: from James Brown and Parliament-Funkadelic to Fatboy Slim. During this concert, recorded at the festival Jazz à Vienne, Bootsy maintains that same energy, giving a spectacular show.

programme.title: Christian Scott
programme.sub-title: Christian Scott aTunde Adjuah, The Walk
programme.desc: In 2019, the vibrant city of Sofia, Bulgaria, hosted the International A to JazZ Festival. Among the featured acts was the trailblazing jazz trumpeter Christian Scott aTunde Adjuah. This genre-defying artist captivated the audience with his eclectic “stretch music” an approach that incorporates hip-hop and reaches back through the American canon into African percussion and its rich melodic content. Trumpeter Christian Scott aTunde Adjuah's quintet, which includes drummer Corey Fonville, percussionist Weedie Braimah, pianist Lawrence Fields, and bass guitarist Max Mucha, delivered a performance that defied boundaries and expectations.

programme.title: Tony Bennett
programme.desc: Relive the magic of one of the most beloved crooners in music history in his prime: Tony Bennett! Recorded live in London's Royal Albert Hall on March 2, 1974, this enchanting performance showcases Bennett's remarkable vocal prowess and charisma to full effect. Bennett is accompanied by his musical director Torrie Zito and an orchestra of British musicians that includes Kenny Clare (drums), Don Lusher (trombone), and Kenny Baker (trumpet). Tune in for Bennett's captivating take on songs “The Good Things in Life”, “My Favorite Things”, “My Love”, “I've Got Five Dollars”, “It Don't Mean a Thing”, and “Maybe This Time” in this magical concert recording.

programme.title: Oscar Peterson Trio, Stuff Smith & Ella Fitzgerald
programme.sub-title: O.P. Trio and E. Fitz. - Jazz At The Philharmonic
programme.desc: The Royal Concertgebouw in Amsterdam is a world-renowned concert hall, known for its first-rate acoustics. It has attracted many famous performers over the years and is one of the Netherlands' most treasured musical institutions. On May 5, 1957, jazz impresario Norman Granz presented his Jazz at the Philharmonic tour at the Concertgebouw in Amsterdam. The Canadian pianist Oscar Peterson and his trio of guitarist Herb Ellis and bassist Ray Brown are later joined by trumpeter Roy Eldridge and drummer Jo Jones. As an added attraction, American violinist Stuff Smith joins the proceedings. American singer Ella Fitzgerald, accompanied by pianist Don Abney, Ellis, Brown and Jones, hits her vocal peak in a stunning set that culminates in a jam session of It Don't Mean A Thing (If It Ain't Got That Swing) with the entire ensemble.

programme.title: Chic
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007

programme.title: Chen Xue-Hong, Zhang Cheng, Chen Yunjie & Chen Sa
programme.sub-title: Piano works by Chopin, Scriabin, Schumann & Liszt
programme.desc: In recent years, a new generation of Chinese pianists has emerged on the international scene. But there are many more young Chinese artists, who the Académie France-Chine aims to enable to deepen their art by introducing them to and giving them a platform within French and European culture. Four of these artists are Chen Xue-Hong, Zhang Cheng, Chen Yunjie and Chen Sa, who made their joint debut in Paris in this unique concert at the Théâtre des Champs-Élysées that showcased their extraordinary talent. On the program are Chopin's Piano Sonata No. 2, Schumann's Piano Sonata No. 1, Scriabin's Piano Sonata No. 8 and Paysage (No. 3) and Mazeppa (No. 4) from Liszt's Études d'Exécution Transcendante. The concert closes with Messiaen's Regard de l'Esprit de la joie (No. 10) from Vingt regards sur l'Enfant-Jésus.

programme.title: Neeme Järvi, Lucerne Symphony Orchestra, Martha Argerich & Mischa Maisky
programme.sub-title: Shchedrin's Double Concerto, Franck and Dvorák
programme.desc: The Lucerne Symphony Orchestra under the baton of Neeme Järvi presents the world premiere of Rodion Shchedrin's Double concerto for cello, piano and orchestra. Soloists are Martha Argerich (piano) and Mischa Maisky (cello). The concert program features Antonín Dvořák's Scherzo capriccioso Des-Dur Op. 66, B 131, Shchedrin's aforementioned Double concerto "Romantic Offering", César Franck's Sonata for piano and cello in A, and Dmitri Shostakovich's Symphony No. 9, Op. 70. This première performance was recorded at the Culture and Congress Centre of Lucerne, KKL, on February 9, 2011. The Lucerne Symphony Orchestra is orchestra-in-residence at KKL Luzern. The Lucerne Symphony Orchestra is Switzerland's oldest symphony orchestra and has won an international standing that extends far beyond its home base.

programme.title: Daniel Barenboim
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Ivan Fischer & Budapest Festival Orchestra
programme.sub-title: Works by Bach, Bartók, and Brahms
programme.desc: Iván Fischer leads his Budapest Festival Orchestra in an exciting concert program consisting of works by J. S. Bach, Béla Bartók, and Johannes Brahms. The program opens with Bach's Brandenburg Concerto No. 3 in G major, BWV 1048. This is followed by one of Bartók's best-known pieces: Music for strings, percussion and celesta. Remarkable is the work's instrumentation: Bartók divided the strings into two groups that are placed on opposite sides of the stage, to create antiphonal effects. The program ends with Brahms's Symphony No. 3 in F major, Op. 90. This performance was recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary, on December 4, 2017.

programme.title: The Philharmonics
programme.desc: Chamber music ensemble The Philharmonics pays tribute to the music of Vienna in this March 9, 2011 concert from Vienna's Café Sperl. The ensemble, which consists of musicians from the Vienna Philharmonic and the Berlin Philharmonic, performs arrangements of five popular waltzes by Johann Straus II. Among them are Kaiser-Walzer, Op. 437, and Schatz-Walzer, Op. 418, from the operetta The Gypsy Baron. In May 1921, the likes of Arnold Schönberg, Alban Berg, and Anton Webern wrote these chamber music arrangements to raise funds for their Society for Private Musical Performances. Although both the concert and the auction of the scores were very successful, the Society eventually went under. In addition to these pieces by Strauss, The Philharmonics perform works by Fritz Kreisler, Leopold Godowsky, as well as The Philharmonics's first violinist, Tibor Kováč. The program comes to an end with Godowsky's tribute to the city: Alt Wien.

programme.title: Mahler Chamber Orchestra
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Mahler Chamber Orchestra & Barbara Hannigan
programme.sub-title: Barbara Hannigan: A Late Night Concert
programme.desc: Barbara Hannigan conducts the Mahler Chamber Orchestra in a concert recorded at the Lucerne Festival of 2014. There are pianists who also conduct, and concert masters who lead their orchestra from the violin desk, but a star soprano who coordinates an ensemble while at the same time negotiating the trickiest coloratura singing is something entirely new! This concert opens with the Overture from Rossini's La scala di seta, followed by three concert arias by Mozart: Vado, ma dove? O Dei!, K. 583, Un moto di gioia, K. 579 and Misera, dove son? K. 369. After renditions of György Ligeti's Concert Românesc and Mysteries of the Macabre, the concert closes with Fauré's Pelléas et Mélisande, Op. 80, a suite derived from incidental music.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Desentierra un fragmento de la historia con los expertos del empeño: una moneda antigua llega a la tienda. ¿Se llevará Rick este tesoro plateado o se quedará sin nada?

programme.title: Pawn Stars

programme.title: Señora Acero: Sara intenta escapar
programme.desc: Consuelo hace un sacrificio para que Sara y Faría intenten huir. En el aeropuerto, el Indio se apresura a borrar el rastro del cártel.

programme.title: Buscando a Frida
programme.desc: Salvador debe responder preguntas de Cabrera y de la fiscal. Una relación secreta impulsó a Frida a fugarse de su casa y, al día siguiente de su desaparición, llamó a su tío para estar con él.

programme.title: Buscando a Frida
programme.desc: Salvador va a la corte a oír los cargos que le imputan, y Abelardo pierde el control. Rafaela habla con sus hijos sobre la confesión de su padre, pero Ingrid cree que lo obligaron a decir eso.

programme.title: Buscando a Frida
programme.desc: Marcela visita a Salvador en prisión, necesita ver a los ojos al "cobarde" que mató a su hija. El encuentro desata la ira, Terán sigue negando que abusó de Frida y que le disparó.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Mónica sugiere que Aurelio negocie su propia mercancía y la divida con los colombianos. Doña Alba se interpone cuando la idea separa a los hermanos Casillas.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Se planean dos ataques durante la reunión entre el presidente mexicano y el director de la DEA de EE. UU. Luego de una injusta pelea, acusan a Leonor de matar a una prisionera.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Lucía se encuentra mal. Lucho es detenido cuando trata de buscar a Irene. Todos los aliados de Gabriela desconfían de Alejandro, creen que los puede traicionar por ser hijo de la loba.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica descubre que Cecilia recibió un abortivo de Antonia. David enfrenta a la señora Dantés, cree que lo quiere poner en contra de su abuela y le declara que, desde ahora, son enemigos.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Un juez comprado decide que el Chamuco pertenece a Aníbal Villegas y a Antonia Guerra. Llega Eugenia, alias Brigitte, una hermosa prostituta contratada por Antonia para enamorar a David.

programme.title: Corazón valiente: En riesgo de muerte
programme.desc: Las vidas de Juan Marcos y Ángela corren peligro, Luis los tiene en la mira, pero no puede accionar el gatillo. Llega la policía. Willy le propone a Samantha una vida juntos.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: Stella toma clases de refinamiento para parecer "fresa" con su perrito y reconquistar a Manuel. La Policía busca a Antonio en casa de Chivis y él se esconde, ella le pide el divorcio.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: Después de un ataque de celos de Vicente en el salsódromo, Lucía confronta a su padre sobre Chivis. Manuel le confiesa que está enamorado de ella. Stella juega golf y conoce a un millonario.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: María José cumple sus amenazas y se muda con Andrés. Chivis vuelve a la oficina al enterarse de que su amiga Catalina y Manuel se besaron. Stella se viste igual que Chivis. Manuel la llama ridícula.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Ariel recibe la gran noticia del embarazo de Bianca, pero ella le deja claro que no quiere tener al bebé Flavia está en desacuerdo, cree que un hijo sería un seguro de vida para Bianca.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Camila, una empleada de los Piamonte pelea con Katia, la sirvienta de Flavia. Bianca trata de aclararlo todo, pero escucha a Camila hablar mal de las Santillana y la despide junto a su familia.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Bianca pide una cita para interrumpir su embarazo, su decisión es firme. Nina se entera del despido de tres empleados y se lo dice a Ariel. La subasta de las Santillana es un fracaso.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: El dolor invade el alma de Ariel, que sufre por la interrupción del embarazo de Bianca ella ni siquiera sabe si quiere seguir con su marido en la casa hay continuas peleas, Nina se preocupa.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Start with one large, whole Salmon, and observe as Julia and Jacques transform the fish into Salmon tartar and “Instant Gravlax.” This, of course, is prelude to baking the Salmon in an “only Julia can get away with it” bicycle pump inflated parchment papillote (bag).

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.sub-title: Roast of Veal and Leg of Lamb
programme.desc: First is a Roast of Veal with Wild Mushrooms, Braised Endive, onions and white wine—the aromas just fill the kitchen. Second is a delicious Leg of Lamb, hip bone removed, studded with garlic on a ragout of white beans and pancetta, onions, mushrooms and thyme. And, not only are you shown how to prepare these dishes, but Jacques then demonstrates, step-by-step, how to carve and serve them.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: One Potato, two potato, oh, so many potatoes. Julia and Jacques share their tricks, “trucs” and techniques for perfect baked potatoes, airy mashed potatoes, creamy potato casserole, and delightful lighter-than-air crispy-fried pommes soufflés.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Duck is a favorite in restaurants, but often considered too difficult to cook at home. No longer! Julia prepares her original (first shown on The French Chef) pan roasted duck, glazed with shallots and parsnips. And Jacques roasts a whole duck, then combines slices of the juicy duck breast with garlic, mustard and delicate salad greens tossed in garlic, mustard and duck giblets.

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: When the weather heats up it's time for family dishes that work on the grill or in the pan. Jacques' great summer menu with Asparagus in Butter Sauce, a Grilled Steak with Zucchini, topped with Anchovy Butter, Curly Dogs for the kids. He shows you classic ways to cut potatoes and ends with a Patriotic Raspberry and Blueberry Galette. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Gathering with family and friends around the table or for a game of boules is the life's greatest pleasure for Jacques. He makes chicken wings, cucumber soup, merguez sausage, zucchini canapes, hummus and his father's Fromage Fort. Simple food that can be made ahead means that you can enjoy a glass of wine with your company. (S1 E02)

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques shows that with a well-stocked pantry and a few good cooking techniques, you can make a tasty dish or a simple meal. His pantry essentials include potato flakes for a simple soup, spaghetti for a quick main dish, lentils, canned salmon, polenta and finally, in the freezer, a poundcake that can be transformed into a celebration dessert. (S1 E03)

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacues knows that most of us want to eat a healthy diet with lots of organic produce. Now so much is available at farmers markets and in grocery stores, you don't have to spend a fortune if you chose what's in season when it tastes the best. But for those times you're in a hurry, it's okay to grab prewashed, precut or frozen vegetables to make your life easier. (S1 E04)

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques suggests that mastering simple skills and techniques will make your life easier and when you're comfortable in the kitchen, you'll be more creative and avoid the trap of a quick fix with a frozen meal…or worse! He teaches you how to sharpen knives, cut and prepare vegetables and eggs and finally make a delicious gratin. (S1 E05)

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques enjoyed many new food trends. But on a cold damp night, he still craves classic dishes like onion soup or for a family dinner or an elegant meal, a roast chicken. For him, these dishes will never go out of fashion, just like the apple galette he's been making for decades. (S1 E06)

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques loves seafood and feels lucky to live by Long Island Sound with its wonderful stocks of Atlantic fish and shellfish. He prepares scallops, crab and cod––raw, fried, sauteed or grilled in dishes that are quick, simple and delicious. (S1 E07)

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Jacques loves egg––eggs cooked any way. He makes them for us, fried, as an omelet, en cocotte, hard cooked and baked. Perfect for breakfast, lunch, or dinner he buys organic eggs from a local producer, and recommends that you buy the best quality and the freshest you can find… He paints a lot of chickens too and has included some of his favorites for you to enjoy! (S1 E08)

programme.title: Jacques Pépin Cooking at Home
programme.desc: For Jacques, a rite of spring is to enjoy the salad his father made every year at this time… Spring is also when asparagus appears and he pairs it with grilled tuna. He cooks fresh peas as soon as they arrive in the market and Jacques, not wanting to waste anything, uses the pods to make a soup. He ends with his friend Ed's Pasta Primavera… (S1 E09)

programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: New trainee Jethro earns praise from senior lifeguards for rescuing a man more than double his size, but his fortunes reverse when he accidentally locks himself in the lifeguard tower and struggles to find a way out. programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A boy goes missing in the water. As lifeguards search desperately, the boy's mother breaks down convinced her son has drowned. programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.desc: While attempting a repo of a "green energy" bio-diesel vehicle, Froy's (Froylan Tercero) lack of knowledge of the vehicle's specialized fuel system sets the bus ablaze... and when his error causes it to explode, he and Matt (Matt Burch) abandon builders/owners Mickie (Michael Q. Schmidt) and Joey (Gino Calabro) in the middle of the desert.

programme.title: The Hearse Isn't Empty?
programme.desc: Matt and Lou find themselves in an upscale neighborhood, facing off with a distraught accountant and his belligerent, kick-happy son. Then, Sonia and Froy crash a pool party where the guests were happy to give up their clothes, but they're not willing to give up their car. Finally, Matt and Lou encounter a hearse that they've been tracking for weeks, but before they're able to hook it up, they've got to figure out what's in the back

programme.title: Airplane Arrest
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo an airplane, but Froy finds himself in handcuffs when Lou takes off. Matt joins Sonia on a repo from a pole dancing studio, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Don't Cry, Bro
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy track a car to the compound of what seems to be a polygamist cult. Will their charismatic leader put up a fight for his Prius, or will he have his followers do it for him?

programme.title: The Trouble with Tractors
programme.desc: The team's work with the anger management specialist starts to pay off with disastrous consequences. Sonia and Froy drive to the country to repo a tractor and are forced to confront a group of irate corporate hayriders, Lou and Sonia wrangle with a confused lady who is missing both her car and her sense of decency, and Matt and Sonia get into a Mexican standoff with a wealthy divorcee, his daughter, and her rageaholic boyfriend.

programme.title: El Prisionero
programme.desc: Lou and his cousin Rob face trouble on the job when a debtor makes shocking claims to police about the newest member of the Pizarro clan. Plus, will a repossession from a well-connected socialite end with Matt and Froy riding into the sunset, or is somebody going to end up locked in a Mexican prison?

programme.title: Naked and Dangerous
programme.desc: Sonia and Lyndah try to repossess a hot tub away from a group of upset partiers. Then, Lou and Matt try to negotiate with a pair of unintelligible and enraged parade participants. And, Lou and Lyndah must repo a car from a group of old men.

programme.title: Suspicious Packages
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy repo a hummer from a bachelorette who is down to party, but when the cops arrive it's the repo team who is in for a shock.

programme.title: Froy's Bait and Lou's Cake
programme.desc: Lou and Froy set out some bait in a gated community to attract a security guard who's slow to make his payments, but quick to pull out his pepper spray. Then, Matt and Lou crash a wedding to repo a car from a truant DJ, but will they be able to get away unscathed when the party turns on them? And, Lou and Froy confront a gang of bikers in a back alley. Will the repo team's pleas for patience and calm be enough to overcome the angry bikers' bats and chains?

programme.title: We Have to Dispose of It
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Matt hunt down a truck that's being used by a pool cleaner to engage in some illicit activities with a collection of wealthy wives. Then, Lou and Sonia find themselves in the middle of a business dispute when they try to sneak off with a catering van filled with food. And finally, Froy, Lyndah, and Matt wind up in the middle of a gang dispute when they try to repo a tricked out lowrider on the outskirts of town.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Padma Lakshmi, Love Bug: Digital Dating at Any Age, Drew's News

Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Anna Chlumsky, Aida Rodriguez, Mushroom Bolognese

Plus, Pasta Week continues with “Preppy Kitchen” series creator John Kanell whipping up a Wild Mushroom Bolognese.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Gwen Stefani opens up to Drew about motherhood, her new music, working alongside husband Blake Shelton on "The Voice" and more. Plus, Gwen surprises a superfan with a makeover with her new beauty line and shares tips to achieve her iconic winged eyeliner and signature red lip look.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: “Pen15” Maya Erskine & Anna Konkle, Drew's News with Danny Pellegrino, Chef Pilar Valdes
programme.desc: Drew channels her inner Josie Geller to interview middle school BFFs and stars of “Pen15” Maya Erskine and Anna Konkle. Plus, Drew and Chef Pilar Valdes are in the kitchen whipping up Drew's Grilled Cheese on the Griddle and Pilar's Tomato Soup. Plus, Danny Pellegrino joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk for a special nostalgic candy edition.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Thrifty Week with Bobby Flay, The Old Gays, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew kicks-off thrifty week, dedicating a whole week to learning the secrets to saving money and sharing inexpensive cooking hacks and budget-friendly design ideas. World-renowned chef Bobby Flay joins Drew to whip up his own version of a Juicy Lucy Pimento Cheeseburger from his new cookbook, “Beat Bobby Flay.” Then, four friends who have become a social media sensation, The Old Gays, help Drew interpret some popular slang phrases. Plus, an all-new Drew's News where Drew and Ross Mathews serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Charlamagne Tha God, Drew & Pilar Turkey Roulade, Drew Gooder:TeacherAdoption
programme.desc: Actresses America Ferrera & Karrie Martin Lachney on their Netflix series “Gentefied.” Then, in all new Designed by Drew: Drew surprises the first career female firefighter in the city of Long Beach NY and her fellow firefighters with a firehouse den makeover. Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are joined at the Drew's News desk by “Entertainment Tonight” Co-Host Nischelle Turner.

Actress Michelle Pfeiffer joins Drew to share her favorite tips and discuss her award-winning fragrance Henry Rose. Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are joined at the Drew's News desk by Megababe Founder and body acceptance champion Katie Sturino.

programme.title: Hollywood Signs
programme.desc: Hollywood Signs is the documentary that celebrates autograph collecting, collectors, and our obsession with celebrities. It focuses on autograph dealing, the history of the autograph, autograph conventions, celebrities' point of view, and, of course, the folks whose lives revolve around autographs. Hollywood Signs is a love letter to a world with characters you definitely don't see every day. Directed by Bill Fishman.

programme.title: The Emoji Story
programme.desc: Emojis are a worldwide phenomenon, with some arguing that these smiling poops and heart-eyed faces are on the verge of actually becoming their own language. Who, if anyone, is in charge of this new global digital language? Directed by Ian Cheney and Martha Shane.

programme.title: Tickled
programme.desc: After stumbling upon a bizarre “competitive endurance tickling” video online, wherein young men are paid to be tied up and tickled, reporter David Farrier reaches out to request a story from the company. But the reply he receives is shocking—the sender mocks Farrier's sexual orientation and threatens extreme legal action should he dig any deeper. So, like any good journalist confronted by a bully, he does just the opposite: he travels to the hidden tickling facilities in Los Angeles and uncovers a vast empire, known for harassing and harming the lives of those who protest their involvement in these films. The more he investigates, the stranger it gets, discovering secret identities and criminal activity. With humor and determination, Farrier and co-director Dylan Reeve summon up every resource available to get to the bottom of this tickling wormhole. Directed by David Farrier

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: South of Barcelona lies the Ebro Delta. Its beaches and lagoons are an exceptional refuge for migratory and native bird species. The delta is known for the numerous pink flamingos that nest near the glittering white saltworks. Sea salt is extracted and rice is cultivated in the delta. The impressive lake landscape is endangered to a certain extent by human intervention. For fear of their harvest, some rice farmers take action against flocks of birds. Invasive rice pests are also a threat to farmers in Europe's largest rice growing region. Other problems make the situation more difficult, such as climate change and rising sea levels or dams holding back sediments. What can be done to preserve the unique Ebro Delta?

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Heli Platform to Platform Jump, Barber Shop, Container Launch
programme.desc: This episode features four co-ed pairs competing as teams. In the first stunt, both team members leap back and forth between two platforms hanging from helicopters with each person transferring up to 10 flags from one platform to the other and then jumping in the water. The three teams to get highest flag total will advance to the next round. In the second stunt one team member is seated in a barber chair and their partner spins them. When the chair stops, they have to get whichever haircut their head was pointing to. There are six haircuts they can get. Teams would advance to the finals if both members got their designated haircuts. In the finale a crane lifts a large container to 200 feet in the air, both team members have to climb rope ladders hanging from the container. Once they reach the container, they both have to scale a narrow ledge on the side, collect two Allen wrenches, and climb another ladder to the top. Once on top, they have to use the wrenches to unscrew hatches and climb down into the container. When they were both inside, they have to touch two pieces of a live wire together in order to blow themselves out of the container and into the water below. The team to complete this stunt the fastest would be the Fear Factor Champions at winning $50,000. This week competing in the Home Invasion is the Frederickson family of Hagerstown, Maryland.

programme.title: Gatra Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Skip the forest trek to the beach, but miss none of the sights as you feast your eyes on this slice of paradise. Gatra Beach conservation has everything to satiate your appetite for the more remote destinations in nature.

programme.title: Flow of Life
programme.desc: Flow of life is a relaxing film full of beautiful images of amazing landscapes. Mountains, Forests, Creeks and Rivers as well as Butterflies, Bees, Bumblebees, lizards and more. Also included are gentle breath reminders to assist in a meditative experience. All scored with relaxing music, composed by Chris Collins.

programme.title: Dolphin Voyage Relaxation
programme.desc: Replace your worries with wonder as you journey into the deep blue calming ocean with a pod of friendly dolphins in this new 1-hour long film. "Dolphin Voyage Relaxation" is 1-hour long and features some spectacular underwater cinematography by Peter Schneider and a synergistic blend of audio including underwater nature sounds, calming ambient music by The Cynic Project, and a subtle background layer of harmonically tuned binaural relaxation sounds by Schmidt. The result is an immersive, awe-inspiring adventure with gracefully transitions, leaving the viewer with a powerful dose of calm and healing energy direct from Nature.

programme.title: Featured Artists: Young & Bold by Bidgala

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Fashion Edge E1 — Step into a realm of electrifying fashion and avant-garde creativity with this high-energy collection. Unleashing the boundless imagination with cutting-edge art that redefines fashion's limits and leaves an indelible mark on the world of style.

programme.title: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Fashion Edge E2 — A dynamic showcase of cutting-edge pieces that redefine fashion's limits. From bold, innovative patterns to daring silhouettes, be captivated by an explosion of colors and concepts that ignite the senses.

programme.title: Diverse Perspectives
programme.desc: Diverse Perspectives: Hispanic Artists Now E2 — From bold murals to evocative photographs, this collection illuminates the rich heritage and unique perspectives of Latin American artists. The melodies are bright, and the instruments feature guitars, keys, horns, synths, bongos, and shakers.

programme.title: Diverse Perspectives
programme.desc: Eyes On The East E1 — Immerse yourself in a vibrant tapestry of Asian American and Pacific Islander culture, where each piece resonates with the depth and diversity of this dynamic community, and mid-tempo melodies lull and transport you to an adventure of the Far East.

programme.title: Diverse Perspectives
programme.desc: Women Artists Now E2 — A captivating art anthology spotlighting the brilliance of women creators in a rich tapestry of creativity that transcends borders. Experience the dynamic essence of women shaping the art world with their unique voices and indomitable spirit.

programme.title: Zen Evenings: Elegant Objects
programme.desc: Elegant Objects E1 — Indulge in a mesmerizing collection of artwork that unveils the eternal allure of still life compositions and enchanting objects. Each is a symphony of form, color, and light, celebrating the everyday.
